mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT_IMAGE ( IMAGE_NO, PRODUCT_NO, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, FILE_PATH, IMAGE_ORDER, THUMBNAIL_YN, CRATE_DT ) VALUES ( SEQ_PRODUCT_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{productNo}, #{originName}, #{changeName}, #{filePath}, #{imageOrder}, #{thumbnailYn}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT IMAGE_NO AS imageNo, PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, ORIGIN_NAME AS originName, CHANGE_NAME AS changeName, FILE_PATH AS filePath, IMAGE_ORDER AS imageOrder, THUMBNAIL_YN AS thumbnailYn FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} ORDER BY IMAGE_ORDER
